sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n13215" key="a)pomhru/omai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀπομηρύομαι</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ῡ]</pron>, <sense id="n13215.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">draw up from, out of,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">βυθῶν</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0024.tlg001.perseus-grc1:1:50" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Opp.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">C.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.50</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
